description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a deep blue color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The back is smooth and flat, displaying a prominent black camera module in the upper left corner and a centered, glossy Apple logo. The sides are flat and metallic, with subtle button placements visible on the left edge. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable appearance. Its overall design is minimalist and highly refined, typical of recent Apple iPhone models.
description: A sleek, blue modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, a prominent rear camera module, and a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Back view showing a smooth blue surface, a large black camera module in the top left, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left edge view revealing the slim profile and a subtle button near the upper section.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with a blue circular wallpaper and a notch at the top for sensors.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue circular gradient wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: A large, square-shaped black camera module is located in the top left corner on the back, likely containing multiple lenses and a flash.
attribute_button_layout: One physical button is visible on the left edge, likely a volume or mute switch; no other buttons are visible.
